calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeanette Little of Philip M. Andersen & Associates telephone number 925-225-6838 appeared by telephone for Defendants.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Defendants stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. DEFENDANT CONSTANCE BAKER-COHN and DAVID COHN's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery
is granted. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Off Calendar

Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allysia Holland, Esq. of Phil Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling in its entirety. DEFENDANTS CONSTANCE BAKER-COHN, DAVID COHN's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery is granted in part. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (See order for details of the ruling.) Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltff'S Responses To Defts' Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Monday, December 22, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CONSTANCE BAKER-COHN and DAVID COHN'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendants' Discovery Requests is Granted. Defendants' Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted. Defendants are awarded sanctions against Plaintiff in the amount of $520, which shall be paid to Defendants' counsel within 30 days of the hearing. The Court has a copy of the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Schoenberg; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
